codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Sesuatu telah berlaku. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect ke server. Please check your internet connection dan try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long ke respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection dan try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts dengan newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields dan try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Sesuatu telah berlaku while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect ke server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please segar semula dan try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return ke penjejakan dan try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not simpan your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment dan try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An ralat occurred while memuatkan this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid e-mel atau kata laluan. Please check your details dan try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please pilih a tenant.
codes.REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid atau expired segar semula token
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Log masuk again ke teruskan.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This e-mel is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid atau expired
codes.HOME_SUMMARY_INVALID: Laman utama summary response is invalid
codes.HOME_SUMMARY_LOAD_FAILED: Tidak dapat memuat Laman utama summary
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Tidak dapat menyimpan admission record. Semak sambungan anda dan cuba lagi
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some diperlukan admission details are missing. Please semak highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable ke generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still semak dan simpan admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Tidak dapat memuat admission form. Semak sambungan anda dan cuba lagi
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Tidak dapat menyimpan local admission draft. Please try again

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted untuk reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets atau sent ke external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write peranan.
capture.offlineNotice: Luar talian submissions are dalam giliran dengan structured fields only dan sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then semak structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: Pilih atau sign in ke one active fasiliti before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured semak payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed semak workflows.

privacy.title: Privasi
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences dan session data are stored only on this device. Tiadathing is sent ke external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If dalam talian AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent ke configured services.

about.title: Perihal
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype untuk reference dan training. Tiadat untuk clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support dan advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, atau determine ventilator tetapan.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against pesakit, your fasiliti workflow, dan local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Diperlukan before continuing ke clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device dan will be disegerakkan when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Semak safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data dan uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible untuk pesakit care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in fasiliti context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active fasiliti dan peranan shown by your session. Keep records within correct fasiliti workflow dan follow local escalation, semak, dan approval procedures.

inputs.title: Masukkaning inputs
inputs.body: Use Masukkan ke masukkan available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Pilihan ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing pilihan data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a simpan blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations tunjukkan advisory ventilator setting references dengan a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align dengan your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only dan verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Pemantauan dan alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a cadangan, use Pemantauan ke log vitals dan labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds dan should be assessed according ke local protocol.

offline.title: Luar talian behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Masukkan, advisory summaries, pemantauan) works luar talian. Data is saved locally. Pilihan AI features require connectivity. When kembali dalam talian, teruskan as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume dan oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory ke expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Isipadu tidal (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, dan pH, tied ke a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance dan verification state untuk a reference range. Only active approved atau verified ranges are eligible untuk active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need semak before dataset atau training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue untuk semak decisions, corrections, exclusions, dan audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current luar talian, dalam talian, atau syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden daripada normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; masukkan SpO₂ dan lain-lain vitals when available. untuk better matching, tambah PaO₂, PaCO₂, dan pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app luar talian
offline.body: Masukkan, advisory summaries, dan pemantauan work luar talian. Data is stored locally. Pilihan AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not diperlukan untuk core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, belum selesai, retired, rejected, dan unverified ranges are not eligible untuk active decision-support display. Semak source, version, scope, dan verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness bantuan is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness dan shadow-mode details are visible only ke approved governance roles. Tiadarmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs semak
needsReview.body: Use semak queue ke check submitted data, request correction, luluskan eligible records, atau kecualikan records dengan an audit sebab.

guides.home: Semak fasiliti context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, dan records needing semak before opening a pesakit workflow.
guides.admit: Capture pesakit pathway dan available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly dan semak backend-confirmed calculations after simpan.
guides.tracking: Use penjejakan ke scan recent ventilation status dan semak needs. Read trend flags dengan source data dan local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture untuk de-identified candidate records. Human semak is diperlukan before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use semak queue ke luluskan, request correction, atau kecualikan records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards untuk aggregate quality, semak, reference, dan governance status. Avoid pesakit identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use tetapan untuk akaun, fasiliti, accessibility, privasi, sync, dan reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Semak FiO₂ dan PEEP; consider recruitment; check untuk shunt atau V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Semak minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation dan perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols dan clinical judgment.

ai.label: Sokongan keputusan AI
ai.enableHint: Use dalam talian AI untuk complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture pesakit pathway, umur, body metrics, dan sebab untuk support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, dan uncertain values. Ventilator tetapan are suggested on seterusnya step daripada dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support pesakit is receiving when these values are measured.
oxygenAbgVentilator.timeHint: Use local date dan time untuk observation.

saveReview.description: Semak dan edit dataset-suggested ventilator tetapan, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override sebab when needed, semak status, dan sync state.
saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.
saveReview.recommendationEmpty: Masukkan clinical values dan tap Seterusnya ke generate a dataset cadangan.

saveReview.clinicianConfirmed: Clinician confirms this admission record is ready untuk simpan semak.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single nama–value pair. Pilihan; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Nama

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs atau lain-lain metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used untuk trend analysis dan pemantauan after you start session. Pilihan; you can tambah points later on pemantauan screen.
